fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From SendGrid -> Settings -> API Keys -> Create API Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via SendGrid scopes endpoint

metadata.summary: SendGrid transactional and marketing email delivery at scale.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to SendGrid -> Settings -> API Keys
2. Click 'Create API Key'
3. Name it and choose 'Full Access' or 'Restricted Access' with needed permissions
4. Click 'Create & View' and copy the SG... key
5. Paste it here (the key is only shown once)
